PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN OF PERSON, CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2020 - HEARING HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY THE MINOR. BRIEF UPDATE PRESENTED BY GUARDIAN CAROLYN YORK. BRIEF DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. AT THE CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSIONS, THE COURT STATED THAT IT DID NOT HAVE JURISDICTION WITHOUT THE MINOR'S APPEARANCE OR PRESENCE AND THEN ORDERED THE PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN OF THE PERSON OF UNIQUE DOROTHY YORK OFF CALENDAR. - SEE MINI-MINUTES THIS DATE -
